title: Inspector Hornleigh on Holiday
writer: Sidney Gilliat, Leonard Reginald Gribble, Frank Launder
actors: Gordon Harker, Alastair Sim, Linden Travers
plot: It comes as no surprise when Inspector Hornleigh and his assistant, Sergeant Bingham, go to enjoy the winds and rains on their annual seaside vacation, when they run into a "busman's holiday." One of their fellow boarders at Balmo...
